project_reference.core_research_question: Can the benchmark and replay logic behind the live Phase 4 finding be extracted into a standalone methods repo that installs and runs from repo custody while keeping domain verdicts outside the boundary?
project_reference.current_focus: Freeze the first real source-manifest replay target after the bootstrap pass.

position.last_activity_desc: Instantiated the staged repo, docs, and smoke package.

open_questions: Which real source-manifest family should become the first repo-custody replay gate?
Which cuneiform helper subset belongs in this repo versus the consuming domain repo?

decisions.summary: Keep a synthetic smoke fixture in the staged repo.
decisions.rationale: Needed for a real standalone install gate without rights drift.

decisions.summary: Treat live Phase 4 artifacts as source authority until rerun here.

pending_todos: Select the first real replay target.
Port live stability and replay helpers.
blockers: Final license text is still owner-deferred.

session.stopped_at: Staged repo created; first real replay target still pending.
